title: 10 Verses for the Man Fighting His Phone
caption:
Your grandfather didn't fight this one. You do.

The phone is where lust lives, where envy lives, where your time dies at 2 a.m. And God had something to say about it before the device existed.

Fix your mind before the feed does. Test what you're feeding on. Put it down before the scroll becomes conformity. Flee, not filter. Get into the quiet where He speaks.

The verse you memorize is the one you survive with. You need it before the temptation arrives, not after. "I have hidden your word in my heart that I might not sin against you." Psalm 119:11

Save this. Open the ones that hit. Start there.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phone #discipline #christianity #psalm119
